text: To prevent the spread of fire by convection you should:

options.text: A) Cool the bulkhead around the fire
B) Remove combustibles from direct exposure
C) Close all openings to the area
D) Shut off all electrical power

explanation: Convection spreads fire via the movement of hot gases. Closing all openings (like fire doors and dampers) restricts the flow of these gases, containing the fire.
